name: Animation
desc: Player swings their arm (left click or server-side swing). Empty packet with no payload.
notes: When the server receives this, it broadcasts S0BPacketAnimation to nearby players. The empty packet just notifies the server of the swing. Client-side swings (swingItem()) are purely local and don't send this packet.

modules.name: NoSwing
modules.purpose: Cancel or fake swing animation. NoSwing cancels the arm swing packet.

modules.name: Animation
modules.purpose: Cancel or fake swing animation. NoSwing cancels the arm swing packet.
